The base URL of your Shlink instance (wi: The base URL of your Shlink instance (without /rest/v3/).
Generate an API key via: shlink api-key:: Generate an API key via: shlink api-key:generate
The domain configured in Shlink for shor: The domain configured in Shlink for short URLs.
